---
title: "Home"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/serena-128
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:YOUR-EMAIL@example.com
---

## Welcome

Hi, I’m **Serena Emedeke**, and this ePortfolio showcases my academic work, technical projects, and professional development.

::: {.callout-note}
This portfolio highlights my skills in **Quarto, Git, GitHub, Python, data analysis, and digital presentation**.
:::

## What You’ll Find Here

::: {.callout-tip}
### 📌 Professional Profile  
Information about my background, skills, and experience.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
### 📊 Data Projects  
Python-based projects with data analysis and visualisations.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
### 🧠 Reflection  
Insights into my learning process and skill development.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
### 📄 CV & Contact  
Access to my CV and ways to connect with me.
:::
